name: Delphine Christian
subtitle: third-generation keeper of the ice plant

ultimate_ability.label: The Clear Glass
ultimate_ability.description: Once per game. Wipe the storefront glass and have it stay clear for the full turn: every visitor gets one guaranteed step-forward, and the FOGGING track loses two. The morning shows itself honestly.

notes: Delphine's hand for the Star arcana. FOGGING is the second stat (renamed BEING-THE-CEREMONY / RECEIVING-THE-CEREMONY per scenario). Scenarios: glass_skin (canonical easier), the_notice_in_the_picayune (hardest closing announcement), the_last_sunday (medium unplanned ceremony).
